response.justification: Over 15 years of software experience with strong, recent full-stack TypeScript/Node.js and React work, MongoDB and AWS exposure, Kubernetes-deployable open-source projects, and current hands-on AI-agent/MCP tooling experience that directly matches an unusual role requirement. Deep testing culture (TDD, test-library author, Selenium/testing workshops) aligns with the role's quality focus, though Nest.js, Kotlin, and Python are not explicitly evidenced.
strengths: Recent full-stack TypeScript/Node.js + React experience at product companies
Hands-on AI-agent and MCP development, a rare direct match to requirements
Strong testing and craftsmanship background (TDD, CI/CD, authored test frameworks)
concerns: No explicit Nest.js or Vitest experience listed
Kotlin and Python absent from skills despite multi-language requirement
Significant portion of deep systems work is in D, less transferable to the primary stack
